pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which copies the dataset to this location.
Verified from task description and verifier.py.
Verified by inspecting the downloaded Exam Anxiety.csv which contains the 'Anxiety' column.
Verified by task instructions and JASP Distributions module source code which includes Normal and Gamma distributions.
Verified from task description and the JASP interface structure for distribution fitting.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the 'Exam Anxiety' dataset (Field 2013), located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv. The target variable to be modeled is 'Anxiety'. The user is expected to fit both 'Normal' and 'Gamma' distributions using JASP's Distributions > Continuous > Fit analysis. The output JASP file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Anxiety_Distributions.jasp.
